nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-rumped sirystes
nodes.summary: White-rumped sirystes（White-rumped sirystes，学名 Sirystes albocinereus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-rumped sirystes is found from southwestern Venezuela south along the base of Colombia's Eastern Andes through eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and far western Brazil into northern Bolivia to northern Santa Cruz Department. It primarily inhabits the canopy and edges of humid várzea forest, riparian forest, and the transitions between them and other forest types
